subject: 3368f52c176e186cc42f3faf68f15ded
name: Water Token
description: Water Token (WTR) is the native utility and rewards token of the Fountara platform, designed to fuel decentralized transactions and activities across the Water Pay network and the Water Bank. Fountara leverages blockchain technology to enable secure, transparent, and efficient water-related payments and resource allocations. The Water Bank is an innovative digital repository within Fountara that allows users to store, manage, and transfer water credits represented by WTR tokens. It acts as both a savings platform and a liquidity hub for water resources, enabling individuals, communities, and organizations to participate in sustainable water management and trading. WTR is used for payments, rewards, governance, and resource management throughout the Fountara ecosystem.
